title: Process‑Oriented Work Breakdown Structure for Workplace Relocation
summary: Illustrates a process‑focused Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) for a workplace relocation project, showing level‑1 deliverables, selective deeper decomposition, and the coexistence of methodology and solution WBS components.
content: Level 1 deliverables: Current Location, Target Site Location, Relocation Staff, Transition Plan, Funding deliverables. Some Level 2 items are further decomposed to Level 3 (e.g., Packing Materials, Utilities). The example shows that not all branches need deep decomposition and that a separate methodology WBS can coexist with project‑solution WBS. Project‑management deliverables such as Budget and Budget Release Schedule may appear as separate legs.
can_answer: What does a process‑oriented Work Breakdown Structure look like for a workplace relocation?
How are level‑1 and level‑2 items organized in a process‑focused WBS?
